records.question: Which mountains in Cameroon’s Cameroon line are at most 4070 meters tall and have sunset photos taken with a Panasonic camera lens?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE mountain.range = 'Cameroon line' AND mountain.height <= 4070.0 AND mountain.country = 'Cameroon' AND photos.name = 'sunset' AND camera_lens.brand = 'Panasonic'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN photos AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.mountain_id INNER JOIN camera_lens AS T3 ON T2.camera_lens_id = T3.id WHERE T1.Country = 'Cameroon' AND T1.Range = 'Cameroon line' AND T1.Height <= 4070 AND T3.brand = 'Panasonic' AND T2.name LIKE '%sunset%'
